summary: A clip from a local news segment. A reporter in a dark jacket stands at a roadside with grass and a highway behind her, gesturing toward the road, labeled in the lower-third LAUREN BEACHY @BEACHYONTV. The segment cuts to a woman with eyeglasses interviewed in a plain room with folding tables and chairs; the lower-third reads INVESTIGATION CONTINUES ON HIT AND RUN ON U.S. 13.
